title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Landmark Group India Consulting Pvt Ltd!
